title: Waxed Lightly Weathered Cut Copper Stairs Origin
description: A Origin mod addon about Waxed Lightly Weathered Cut Copper Stairs. This is made for fun and might not be balanced or fun to play :)
body:
**MUST USE WITH ORIGINS MOD AND FABRIC API**
This mod is a addon for Origins mod.
The mod adds a Origin based on Waxed Lightly Weathered Cut Copper Stairs :)
Here is all of the abilities:
- Heavy Body:
Consuming too much copper ingots makes your body heavier and causes you to fall much faster but having close to zero copper charges makes your body lighter. (Having more than 7 copper charges makes you fall faster. Having less than 3 copper charges makes you fall slower. Does not prevent fall damage or increase it.)
- Corrosion:
Touching water is a death scenario for you.
- Copper Skin:
Your copper-like skin makes you more durable and stronger. Any arrow that touches your tough skin will bounce off. (+4 armor points, +2 armor toughness and ability to deflect normal arrows but not spectral.)
- Zap:
Shoot a electric ray to zap your enemies with lightning! But if you miss you will take damage instead.
Keybind: Primary
- Oxidation:
Over time, you will slowly oxidize, causing you to become weaker overall. However, low levels of oxidation can also have positive effects. You can consume an iron zxe or honeycombs to lower your oxidation level (honeycombs have a greater effect than an iron axe).
- Pray:
Pray to the Waxed Lightly Weathered Cut Copper Stairs gods in order to get random effects... Or trigger random calamities.
Keybind: Save Hotbar Activator
- Lightning Rod:
If you are exposed to rain, the lightning will strike you continuously until you are not exposed to the rain anymore.
- Staircase to heaven:
With the power of gods... you are able to summon a staircase to heaven? (Replace the block benath you with Waxed Lightly Weathered Cut Copper Stairs every second.)
Keybind: Load Hotbar Activator
- Copper Vomit:
Tired of carrying too much copper in your stomach? Well, say no more! Use this ability to vomit most of your Copper Charges and deal damage to enemies! Just remember to aim at a entity for the attack to work otherwise you will just waste your copper charges.
 Keybind: Secondary
- Copper Charge:
Eat copper ingots to gain copper charges! Copper Charges are used to use other abilities and some powers. If an ability has a golden star next to it that means it uses Copper Charges, hover your mouse on to the golden star to see how much Copper Charges it uses.
- Reduced Mobility: Your copper body prevents you from swimming and gliding.
- Copper vision: Your eyes are like night vision goggles, but better, giving you the ability to see entities through walls.
Keybind: Slot 9
